mapper.select: SELECT spot_id, name, category, hotness, rating, description, keywords FROM spots
SELECT spot_id, name, category, hotness, rating, description, keywords FROM spots WHERE name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR keywords LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
SELECT spot_id, name, category, hotness, rating, description, keywords FROM spots WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
